ext_description.message: Instantly send questions to Google Gemini from your browser.
ext_description.description: Extension description shown in the Web Store

model_label_flash.description: Display name for the Flash (fast) model

model_label_thinking.description: Display name for the Thinking model

model_label_pro.description: Display name for the Pro model

model_char_flash.description: Single-letter abbreviation for Fast, shown in collapsed popup button

model_tail_flash.description: Letters after the first character for Fast (F + ast = Fast)

model_tail_thinking.description: Letters after the first character for Think (T + hink = Think)

model_tail_pro.description: Letters after the first character for Pro (P + ro = Pro)

popup_logo_tag.description: Tagline shown under the logo in the popup header

popup_model_flash_title.description: Tooltip for the Fast model button

popup_model_thinking_title.description: Tooltip for the Think model button

popup_model_pro_title.message: Gemini Pro ✨ — most capable (requires Gemini Advanced)
popup_model_pro_title.description: Tooltip for the Pro model button

popup_selection_clear_title.description: Tooltip on the selection clear button

popup_inject_msg.message: Suspicious content — may attempt to override Gemini’s behavior.
popup_inject_msg.description: Warning shown when prompt injection is detected

popup_inject_cancel.description: Cancel button in the injection warning

popup_inject_send_anyway.description: Override button in the injection warning

popup_templates_header.description: Header in the template dropdown panel

popup_templates_close_title.description: Close button tooltip in the template dropdown

popup_templates_empty_text.description: Empty state text in the template dropdown

popup_templates_add_settings.description: Link text in the template empty state

popup_hint_send.description: Hint bar text when Enter submits the form

popup_hint_newline.description: Hint bar text when Shift is held

popup_attach_title.description: Tooltip on the image attach button

popup_templates_trigger_title.description: Tooltip on the template grid button

popup_placeholder_6.message: Ask about the page you’re reading

popup_chars_left.description: Char counter when near the limit

popup_chars_over.description: Char counter when over the limit

popup_file_error_svg.message: "$FILENAME$" rejected: SVG files are not allowed
popup_file_error_svg.description: Error when an SVG is dropped

popup_file_error_not_image.description: Error when a non-image file is dropped

popup_file_error_too_large.description: Error when a file exceeds the size limit

popup_file_error_bad_format.message: "$FILENAME$" rejected: file content does not match image format
popup_file_error_bad_format.description: Error when magic bytes don't match

popup_file_skipped_one.description: One file skipped when at max capacity

popup_file_skipped_other.description: N files skipped when at max capacity

content_status_uploading_one.description: Status overlay: uploading a single image

content_status_switching_model.description: Status overlay: changing the active model

content_status_model_unavailable.description: Status overlay: requested model is locked, fell back to Flash

bg_menu_open_gemini.description: Context menu item: open Gemini (action button right-click)

bg_menu_ask_gemini.description: Context menu item: open Ask Gemini popup from page context

bg_menu_ask_selection.description: Context menu item: send selected text to Gemini. %s is replaced by Chrome with the selected text — keep %s verbatim.

options_title.description: Page title of the options page

options_open_gemini_title.description: Tooltip on the logo/brand link in options

options_kofi_text.description: Ko-fi link text in options sidebar

options_history_desc.message: Your last 20 queries, most recent first. Click any entry to re-use it.

options_history_empty_title.description: Empty state heading (no prompts sent yet)

options_history_empty_sub.message: Questions you send to Gemini will appear here.

options_history_send_title.description: Tooltip on the send button in each history row

options_history_copy_title.description: Tooltip on the copy button in each history row

options_history_delete_title.description: Tooltip on the delete button in each history row

options_templates_desc.message: Per-model prompt snippets — trigger them with / or the grid button in the popup. Each model has its own list.

options_templates_add_btn.description: Button to open the new-template form

options_templates_cancel.description: Cancel button in the template form

options_templates_save.description: Save button in the template form

options_templates_placeholder.description: Placeholder text in the template textarea

options_templates_empty_sub.message: Click “Add template” to create your first snippet.

options_tmpl_form_new.description: Form label when creating a new template

options_tmpl_form_edit.description: Form label when editing an existing template

options_tmpl_delete_body.description: Body text in the delete template confirmation dialog

options_tmpl_edit_title.description: Tooltip on the edit button in each template card

options_tmpl_delete_title.description: Tooltip on the delete button in each template card

options_appearance_desc.message: Theme and model preferences, synced across popup and this page.

options_theme_sub.message: Choose dark, light, or follow your system setting

options_theme_hint.message: Auto follows your OS setting. Changes take effect in both the popup and this page immediately.

options_model_label.description: Preference row label for default model selector

options_model_sub.message: Which model to target when sending a prompt from the popup

options_model_hint.message: Fast is Gemini’s quick default — great for most tasks. Think uses Gemini’s reasoning model for complex problems. Pro ✨ uses the advanced model — requires Gemini Advanced.

options_contextmenu_desc.message: Customise the right-click actions that appear when you select text on any page.

options_contextmenu_feature.message: Ask Gemini: “…” — right-click any selected text to send it to Gemini, optionally wrapped by a smart prompt template.
options_contextmenu_feature.description: Feature description in the context menu section

options_pe_label.description: Preference label for the PE toggle

options_pe_sub.message: Auto-detect context and apply a smart prompt template
options_pe_sub.description: Preference subtitle for the PE toggle

options_pe_toggle_title.description: Tooltip on the PE master toggle

options_pe_hint.message: When on, Ask Gemini detects whether your selection is code, an error, a question, etc., and wraps it in a matching prompt. Each rule is editable. The Summarize prefix below is bypassed while this is active.

options_pe_rule_enable_title.description: Tooltip on a disabled PE rule toggle

options_pe_rule_disable_title.description: Tooltip on an enabled PE rule toggle

options_pe_rule_reset_btn.description: Button to reset a PE rule to default

options_pe_rule_reset_title.description: Tooltip on the PE rule reset button

options_pe_rule_placeholder.message: Template — use {selection} for the selected text
options_pe_rule_placeholder.description: Placeholder in PE rule textareas. {selection} is a literal token, not a variable — keep it verbatim.

options_pe_preview_label.description: Label above the PE rule preview

options_pe_preview_placeholder.description: Placeholder shown in the PE preview where {selection} would appear

options_pe_reset_all_btn.description: Button at the bottom of the PE rules list

options_summarize_label.description: Label for the summarize prefix textarea section

options_summarize_desc.message: This text is automatically prepended to your highlighted text when you choose Summarize with Gemini from the right-click menu. Write a full instruction — Gemini will receive prefix + selection.
options_summarize_desc.description: Description paragraph for the summarize prefix

options_summarize_placeholder.message: e.g. Summarize the following in 3 bullet points:
options_summarize_placeholder.description: Placeholder in the summarize prefix textarea

options_summarize_reset_btn.description: Button to reset the summarize prefix

options_summarize_save_btn.description: Button to save the summarize prefix

options_summarize_hint.message: The prefix can include line breaks — use Shift+Enter inside the box. Newlines are preserved when the prompt is sent to Gemini.
options_summarize_hint.description: Hint below the summarize prefix editor

options_summarize_preview_ph.description: Placeholder shown in the summarize prefix preview

options_shortcut_desc.message: Open the Ask Gemini popup from anywhere in your browser.

options_shortcut_open_sub.message: Works on any page, even without the toolbar visible

options_shortcut_hint.message: To reassign the key combination, click Change or visit chrome://extensions/shortcuts and find Ask Gemini.

options_shortcut_not_set.description: Shown in the shortcut display when no shortcut is assigned

options_shortcut_rclick_sub.message: Auto-fills the popup with your selection

options_shortcut_icon_sub.message: Right-click the extension icon in the toolbar

options_shortcut_icon_kbd.description: Keyboard label for right-clicking the icon

options_about_section_desc.message: Ask Gemini — a lean, open-source Chrome extension.

options_about_app_desc.message: Instantly send questions to Google Gemini from your toolbar. No API key, no account needed — just type and go.
options_about_app_desc.description: Short description in the about card

options_about_version.description: Version string shown in the about card

options_about_feat_left_click.message: Left-click the icon to open the popup
options_about_feat_left_click.description: About feature list item 1 (the word Left-click may be wrapped in strong in HTML)

options_about_feat_right_click.message: Right-click the icon to open Gemini directly

options_about_feat_selection.message: Select text on any page, then open the popup — it auto-fills

options_about_feat_shortcut.message: Ctrl+Shift+L opens the popup from anywhere

options_about_feat_slash.message: Type / in the popup to pick a template snippet

options_about_feat_history.message: Your last 20 prompts are saved in History

options_dialog_clear_body.message: All 20 saved prompts will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

options_dialog_clear_cancel.description: Cancel button in the clear-history dialog

options_dialog_clear_ok.description: Confirm button in the clear-history dialog

options_dialog_tmpl_body.message: This snippet will be permanently removed.

options_dialog_tmpl_cancel.description: Cancel button in the delete-template dialog

options_dialog_tmpl_confirm.description: Confirm button in the delete-template dialog

options_dialog_pe_body.message: All prompt engineering rules will be restored to their defaults. Your edits will be lost.

options_dialog_pe_cancel.description: Cancel button in the PE reset dialog

options_dialog_pe_confirm.description: Confirm button in the PE reset dialog

options_toast_model_set.description: Toast shown after changing the default model

options_toast_copied.description: Toast shown after copying a history entry

options_toast_copy_failed.description: Toast shown when clipboard copy fails

options_toast_entry_removed.description: Toast shown after deleting a history entry

options_toast_history_cleared.description: Toast shown after clearing all history

options_toast_tmpl_updated.description: Toast shown after editing an existing template

options_toast_tmpl_saved.description: Toast shown after saving a new template

options_toast_tmpl_deleted.description: Toast shown after deleting a template

options_toast_summarize_saved.description: Toast shown after saving the summarize prefix

options_toast_reset_default.description: Toast shown after resetting the summarize prefix

options_toast_pe_enabled.description: Toast shown when PE is turned on

options_toast_pe_disabled.description: Toast shown when PE is turned off

options_toast_rule_reset.description: Toast shown after resetting a single PE rule

options_toast_saved.description: Toast shown after debounced PE rule save

options_toast_rules_reset_all.description: Toast shown after resetting all PE rules

options_time_just_now.description: Relative time: less than 1 minute ago

welcome_title.description: Page title of the welcome page

welcome_status_active.description: Status pill text on the welcome page

welcome_sub.message: Ask Gemini sits one keystroke away — type a question, highlight text, or fire from anywhere in your browser.
welcome_sub.description: Hero subtitle on the welcome page

welcome_quick_start.description: Section label above the feature cards

welcome_feat1_desc.message: Press Ctrl+Shift+L from any tab to summon the popup instantly.
welcome_feat1_desc.description: Feature card 1 description (keyboard hint kept in English as it's a key combo)

welcome_feat2_desc.message: Highlight any text on any page, right-click, and choose Ask Gemini — it auto-fills.

welcome_feat3_desc.message: Type / in the popup to pick a saved snippet. Manage them in Settings → Templates.

welcome_feat4_desc.message: Switch between Fast, Think, and Pro right in the popup — no detours to Gemini.

welcome_cta.description: CTA button on the welcome page
